title: AFIS%20for%20Tanzania%20Police%20Case%20Study
content:
AUTOMATIC FINGERPRINT 
IDENTIFICATION SYSTEM (AFIS) BASED CRIMINAL TRACKING SYSTEM (CTS) FOR POLICE DEPARTMENTS/CASE STUDY
Tanzania Police improves justice 
delivery process through speedy 
detection of criminals & precise 
crime investigation with AFIS 
based Criminal Tracking System

Tanzania Police Force (TPF) is deployed in and throughout the United 
Republic of Tanzania for the preservation of peace, maintenance of law & order, prevention & detection of crime, apprehension & guarding of offenders and protection of property. Main objectives of TPF are to ensure public security, safety & protection of both life & property of all inhabitants of community; regulate & control the flow of traffic in order to facilitate the movement of persons and goods within the towns and reduce impact of crime on the inhabitants of community through investigation, apprehension & adjudication of persons involved in criminal offences.
Tanzania Police Force aimed at improving its justice delivery process 
through speedy & precise investigation of crime & detection of criminals. TPF’s Criminal Investigation department was following a 
manual procedure to collect fingerprints & other important data of 
all criminals and storing, detecting & matching their information. 
This procedure had many drawbacks because of which it took 
several months to do a simple fingerprint identification, verification 
& matching within the database of 1 million records. And to perform 
these operations department had to rely on fingerprint experts who often committed several errors in their assessment due to fatigue & time pressure.
Due to this manual procedure that was not only outdated but also 
did not meet the critical requirements of criminal investigation department, TPF wanted to implement a new fingerprint identification, verification & matching system that was completely automated and helped them to meet their objective of ensuring public security, safety and protection of both life & property of all people in the country.
TPF selected Techno Brain to address their need and provide them with a suitable solution. Techno Brain made a thorough & detailed study of TPF’s requirements and implemented Automatic Fingerprint Identification System (AFIS) based Criminal Investigation System 
(CTS) at their Dar es Salaam headquarter. A new central system is 
installed at TPF’s headquarter which will capture all the fingerprints 
& demographic data of criminals with the help of barcode scanner and securely upload the information through internet / intranet in a centralized database. Officials are given role based access which 
allows them to access the centralized system from various police 
stations across Tanzania. When a crime happens, officials can identify 
the fingerprints from the location; match them against the information present in the centralized database; track the criminal and finally perform speedy investigation and justice delivery.Customer:
Tanzania Police Force’s (TPF) main objective is preservation of peace, maintenance of law & order, prevention & detection of crime, apprehension & 
guarding of offenders & protection of property.
Industry:
Public
Business Situation:
TPF was looking to implement automated 
fingerprint identification system (AFIS) to track criminals for improving its justice delivery process 
through speedy investigation of crime.
Solution:
Techno Brain implemented AFIS based Criminal 
Tracking System facilitating TPF to detect criminals at a faster rate & improve crime prevention & investigation rate.
Benefits:
• Improved investigation & crime prevention rate
• Fast identification of fingerprints by reducing the average time taken to search
• Minimized risk associated with manual procedure of fingerprint identification
• Improved services & efficiencyCustomer Profile
Quick Sheet
Business Situation
Solution


• Enables collection, storage, retrieval, analysis and ensured 
timely sharing of criminal information from headquarter to investigation & police departments across the country and as well as internationally
• CTS is designed in such a way that it facilitates departments to handle large volumes of fingerprint search requests with stringent response times with high accuracy, minimal errors and faster results
• High powered servers, work station & barcode scanners for capturing, verifying & matching the fingerprints against the existing fingerprint database
• Latent Examiner application marks the minutia points in latent fingerprints and submit them for searching in fingerprint identification system
• CTS allows TPF officials to address Ten Print to Ten Print, Latent to Ten Print and Ten Print to Latent possibilities
• All cabinet meeting and confidential documents stored electronically• Reduced the average time taken for searching a fingerprint against the data stored in centralized database to less than 90 seconds
• Helped TPF to meet their objective of reducing impact of crime on the inhabitants of community through investigation, apprehension, & adjudication of persons involved in criminal offences
• Enabled fast identification of fingerprints resulting in increased crime detection rates
• Increased operation efficiency of the fingerprints bureau & investigation department by:
◊ Reducing the necessity to manually perform fingerprint search and verification.
◊ Improve the communication system across police stations
• Improved coordination & information sharing within law enforcement agencies
• Helped MPS in better management of criminal records and their internal operations
• Facilitated better tracking of criminals, suspects, accused and repeat offenders
• Enhanced efficiency of fingerprint bureau to provide better service to the public & law enforcement agencies by more accurate & faster resultsMS .Net, MS SQL Server 2008, IE using IIS Web Server, Visual Studio 2010
Techno Brain’s AFIS based Criminal Tracking System helped Tanzania Police to reduce human rights violations through quick & correct identification of criminals there by speeding the justice delivery process, increased public confidence and overall security of the country.Major features Benefits
